description_long: This is a pair of open-toe sandals featuring a dark brown footbed with visible white stitching along the perimeter. The upper consists of black and dark brown straps, including a prominent T-strap design that connects to a metallic buckle detail near the instep. The sandals have a slightly elevated heel, providing a modest lift, and the sole appears to be made of a dense, durable material. The footbed is contoured for comfort, and the overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic leather and rubber. These sandals are suitable for casual urban wear, offering both style and comfort for walking on city streets.
description: A pair of dark brown and black open-toe sandals with a T-strap and buckle detail, featuring a contoured footbed and slightly elevated heel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-strap design, buckle detail, and open-toe construction.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the elevated heel, contoured footbed, and strap arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel height and the back of the footbed.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the side profile and strap structure.
